title: Amore by Juliana Glass Pint Tankard (Usher)
features: Tempered Glass Pint Tankard, classic british pub pint glass design with Usher text in classic script font on oval front panel
Classic design is less likely to fall over or be spilt than newer slimmer pint glasses
A classic gift for your usher, whether to give on your wedding day, or as a gift to celebrate your usher's wedding contribution on his birthday or other special occasion.
Dishwasher safe, Dimensions: Height:13 Width:14 Depth:9 cm
Holds standard British Pint (586ml), great for any beer, cider, stout or lager
